title: Designing a Sentiment Analysis Model
scenario: Create a sentiment analysis model that can classify text as positive, negative, or neutral. The model should be able to handle sarcasm and idioms. The input should be a piece of text, and the output should be a sentiment classification.
constraints: Must include a deep learning model
Must be under 100 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the response includes a sentiment classification
Check if the response includes a deep learning model architecture
Check if the response handles sarcasm correctly
Check if the response adheres to the constraints on length
